lines.speaker: JAX
lines.line: Alright, VEDA, what've we got on the latest case?
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of JAX, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: VEDA
lines.line: Looks like another high-society type's gone missing, Jax. This one's got connections to the upper echelons.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of VEDA, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: VEDA
lines.line: I've got a list of suspects, but nothing concrete. Whoever did this is good.
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of JAX, eyes narrowing behind his mirrored shades.

lines.speaker: JAX
lines.line: Good doesn't cut it in this town. Get me everything you've got on the victim.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of JAX, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: JAX
lines.line: I've got a bad feeling about this, Veda.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of JAX, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: VEDA
lines.line: Just what I need, your intuition. Let's focus on the facts.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of VEDA, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: JAX
lines.line: You're not seeing the big picture, Veda. This is more than just another missing person.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of JAX, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: VEDA
lines.line: I am seeing it, Jax. That's why I want to get in and out. We can't just barge in without a plan.
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of JAX, looking up at the warehouse with a mix of caution and curiosity.

lines.speaker: JAX
lines.line: Fine. Let's get moving. But if anyone gets hurt, it's on you.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of JAX, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: VEDA
lines.line: This is it, Jax. This is where they took him.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of VEDA, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: JAX
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of JAX, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: VEDA
lines.line: Look closer. There's a hidden compartment behind that crate.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of VEDA, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: JAX
lines.line: You're a genius, Veda. But what's inside?
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of JAX, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: VEDA
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of VEDA, expression intense and focused.
